recommendations.title: 3:10 to Yuma
recommendations.overview: In Arizona in the late 1800s, infamous outlaw Ben Wade and his vicious gang of thieves and murderers have plagued the Southern Railroad. When Wade is captured, Civil War veteran Dan Evans, struggling to survive on his drought-plagued ranch, volunteer

recommendations.title: Dark Passage
recommendations.overview: A man convicted of murdering his wife escapes from prison and works with a woman to try and prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Broken Arrow
recommendations.overview: Indian scout Tom Jeffords is sent out to stem the war between the American settlers and Apaches in the late 1870s Arizona. He learns that the Indians kill only to protect themselves, or out of retaliation for white atrocities.

recommendations.title: The Hanging Tree
recommendations.overview: Joseph "Doc" Frail is a doctor with a past he's trying to outrun. While in Montana, he comes across a mining camp with a hanging tree and rescues a man named Rune from the noose. With Rune as his servant, Frail decides to settle down, and he takes ov

recommendations.title: Mr. Brooks
recommendations.overview: A psychological thriller about a man who is sometimes controlled by his murder-and-mayhem-loving alter ego.

recommendations.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
recommendations.overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

recommendations.title: High Noon
recommendations.overview: Will Kane, the sheriff of a small town in New Mexico, learns a notorious outlaw he put in jail has been freed, and will be arriving on the noon train. Knowing the outlaw and his gang are coming to kill him, Kane is determined to stand his ground, so

recommendations.title: Dodge City
recommendations.overview: In this epic Western, Wade Hatton, a wagon master turned sheriff, tames a cow town at the end of a railroad line.

recommendations.title: The Assassination of Jesse James by the Coward Robert Ford
recommendations.overview: Outlaw Jesse James is rumored to be the 'fastest gun in the West'. An eager recruit into James' notorious gang, Robert Ford eventually grows jealous of the famed outlaw and, when Robert and his brother sense an opportunity to kill James, their murder

recommendations.title: Angel and the Badman
